items.title: Replace Geist Sans with reading serif and clean sans for UI
items.intent: The font strategy is decided: Literata for prose body text, DM Serif Display for headings, JetBrains Mono for code, Inter/system-ui for UI. Geist Sans is removed. Load Literata and JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts, update @theme font stacks accordingly.
steps: Remove Geist Sans from @theme font-sans declaration
Add Literata (400, 400i, 600) via Google Fonts link in Base.astro
Add JetBrains Mono (400) via Google Fonts link in Base.astro
Update @theme: --font-serif to Literata for prose, keep DM Serif Display for headings (add --font-display), --font-sans to Inter/system-ui for UI, --font-mono to JetBrains Mono
Verify all three font stacks render in browser devtools

acceptanceCriteria.text: Literata font is loaded and declared in theme
JetBrains Mono is loaded and declared in theme for code

items.groomingNotes: Priority confirmed at must. Every visitor sees broken body font — falls back to system-ui silently. Fontsource npm package is the recommended fix for Astro projects (import in global.css, no CDN dependency). Low effort, high visual impact. Should ship in sprint 1.
